case_title: 20TH CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORP. vs. TIEN, SHIHSHIN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
